description: Get the simulation ACTUALLY RUNNING end-to-end: DB up, server running, agents seeded, LLM connected, dashboard showing live data.

userStories.title: Remove broken src/frontend/ and clean up
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to remove the non-functional AI Town fork that fails to build.
acceptanceCriteria: No references to src/frontend/ in any config file

userStories.title: Start PostgreSQL and Redis via docker-compose
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the database and cache running locally.
acceptanceCriteria: docker compose up -d postgres redis succeeds

userStories.title: Run Alembic migrations and seed agents
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the DB schema and 8 agents seeded.
acceptanceCriteria: alembic upgrade head completes without errors
userStories.notes: May need new migration for pos_x, pos_y columns.

userStories.title: Start FastAPI server and verify all endpoints
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the server running and responding.
acceptanceCriteria: uvicorn starts without errors on port 8000
GET /health returns 200 with tick and time_of_day
GET /api/v1/agents returns 8 agents with pos_x pos_y

userStories.title: Write tests for macro/micro tick engine
userStories.description: As a developer, I need tests proving the new tick system works.
acceptanceCriteria: Test: day counter increments after ticks_per_day
Test: micro tick broadcasts to dashboard

userStories.title: Install dashboard deps and verify build + display
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the dashboard showing live data.

userStories.title: Connect one agent client with LLM
userStories.description: As a developer, I need one agent making LLM-powered decisions.
acceptanceCriteria: Client connects via WebSocket with valid token
Client calls LLM API and returns an action

userStories.title: Run 3+ agents for 30 minutes
userStories.description: As a developer, I need multiple agents interacting together.

userStories.title: Capture demo screenshot
userStories.description: As a developer, I need proof the simulation works.
acceptanceCriteria: Screenshot of dashboard with agents and events visible
At least 2 different agent actions in event feed
